description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband is primarily black with tan accent bands near the ear cups, providing both comfort and durability. The ear cups are circular, finished in a brown color, and appear to be made of soft, foam-like material for noise isolation and comfort. The outer shells of the ear cups are a combination of white and teal blue, giving the headphones a modern, stylish appearance. Visible joints and buttons on the headband suggest adjustability and possible folding for portability. The overall design is ergonomic, suitable for extended use in urban environments such as public transport, parks, or cafes.
description: A stylish pair of over-ear headphones with a black and tan padded headband, brown cushioned ear cups, and white and teal blue outer shells. The design is modern and ergonomic, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the headband and both large, brown ear cups with visible teal and white accents on the sides.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the black headband with tan accents and the circular teal outer shell of one ear cup.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's curvature.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the teal outer shell of the opposite ear cup.
